rationale: clauses: ingest user_need/disposition/reviewer from <dhf>/validation (records keyed by UN; blanking the reviewer parse -> reviewer assertion fails, KILLED); per-missing-UN warning at release gate (UN-001+UN-002 both named with no records; neutering the design_gate loop 'for un in unvalidated_user_needs(dhf_dir)'->'for un in []' KILLED); only APPROVED clears (pending UN-002 still warns, approved UN-001 cleared; '== APPROVED'->'!= APPROVED' KILLED and ->'in (APPROVED, "pending")' KILLED; '- approved'->'- set()' KILLED via UN-001-not-warned + unvalidated==[UN-002]); warning does not block (gate.passed asserted in both states; warnings+=->blocking+= on the validation block KILLED via gate.passed)

probes.find:
result.warnings += [
        f"user need {un} has no approved validation record "
probes.replace:
result.blocking += [
        f"user need {un} has no approved validation record "
